title: Facts stored in one session are recalled in the next
description: A continuity note stored in session one must be recallable in session two via memory state, not chat context. The deterministic layer verifies persistence plus a real recall hit (retrieval_count bump).

args.content: Continuity note: eval-first memory regression stays in the long memory suite.
Continuity note: eval-first memory regression stays in the long memory suite.

prompts: Store this durable continuity note in project memory: eval-first memory regression stays in the long memory suite. Then reply done.
Consult project memory, not just this chat: what continuity note was saved about memory regression? Cite the recalled memory.

assertions.name: continuity_note_persisted
assertions.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM memory_facts WHERE content LIKE '%Continuity note%' OR content LIKE '%continuity note%'

assertions.name: continuity_note_recalled
assertions.sql: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(retrieval_count), 0) FROM memory_facts WHERE content LIKE '%ontinuity note%'
